articles.title: This Army veteran will ruck Boston in honor of fallen comrades
articles.description:
"For me, this ruck is about honoring SSG Shaw and preserving the memory of a true hero who gave everything for his team," Fulton said.

The post This Army veteran will ruck Boston in honor of fallen comrades appeared first on Boston.com.
